faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Mill Basin?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Mill Basin typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and treatment method chosen. We offer free inspections and upfront pricing before any work begins.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in a Mill Basin home?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments take 4-6 hours for an average Mill Basin home. Heat treatments can be completed in one day, while chemical treatments may require a follow-up visit 2-3 weeks later to ensure complete elimination of all bed bugs and eggs.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for families and pets in Mill Basin?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products that are safe when applied by our certified technicians. For chemical treatments, we recommend keeping pets and children away for 2-4 hours. Heat treatments are completely chemical-free and safe for re-entry once temperatures normalize.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day bed bug service in Mill Basin?
faqs.answer: Yes, we understand the urgency of bed bug infestations and offer same-day or next-day service throughout Mill Basin whenever possible. Call us before noon for potential same-day treatment availability in your area.
